heading: Border Patrol unit for United States Virgin Islands
label: 925 Border Patrol unit for United States Virgin Islands

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may establish at least 1 Border Patrol unit for the United States Virgin Islands.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall submit a report to the appropriate congressional committees that includes the schedule, if any, for carrying out subsection (a).October 13, 2006
